rationale: Major friction across the board: the archetype's dark, earthy palette (navy/brown/olive) and detailed 2D illustrated cross-section style is the polar opposite of Roof Rails' bright pastel 3D minimalism, and a static landmark reveal communicates none of the run/collect/slide loop that drives install intent for this title. Audience overlap is only mildly plausible since curiosity hooks travel well in broad casual, but without a credible narrative bridge to pole-balancing rooftop runs the concept will mislead users and tank retention. Recommend skipping unless the team can prototype a hybrid where the cross-section reveals a stacked-rooftop course — otherwise reallocate budget to gameplay-forward or satisfying-fail archetypes.
